title: Step 19

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: Your new if statement should have an else clause.
You should assign the integer value 1 to service_charges variable inside your else clause.

description: Still inside the body of the outer if statement, add an else clause to the nested if seat_type == 'Premium': statement and update the service_charges value to 1 inside the else body. Make sure to keep the else indented by four spaces to stay inside the outer if statement body.
